subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we'd be happy to explore this collaboration opportunity with Partner Corp.

Regarding your request, I'm unable to share internal contact details (CTO and VP of Engineering phone numbers). Please find all publicly available contact information on our website at https://company.example.com/contact.

For an introductory call, I'd like to propose the following slots:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which time works best for you, and I'll send a calendar invite accordingly.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
